escalation.rationale: Iran shot down US Apache helicopter over Strait of Hormuz with Trump ordering military response, while Israel continues strikes on Lebanon.

ticker_items: Iran downs US Apache helicopter, Trump orders military response
Israel strikes Lebanese city of Tyre, hits car in Sidon
Xi Jinping concludes rare state visit to North Korea
Bulgaria's new government halts arms supplies to Ukraine
EU proposes entry ban for Russian military personnel

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian attacks spark fires at oil facilities in Russia and Crimea as part of economic pressure campaign.

middle_east.description: Iran launches missile attacks on Israel signaling aggressive regional ambitions.
US struck several Iranian water facilities in retaliation for downing US helicopter in Strait of Hormuz
Israeli strike kills eight people in south Lebanon as military warns Tyre to evacuate
Iran reportedly shot down US Army Apache helicopter near Strait of Hormuz
Israeli forces conducted strikes against Hezbollah targets in southern Lebanese city of Tyre
Israeli strike on vehicle in Sidon killed two people and sparked fire

russia.text: Recent Oreshnik hypersonic missile launches were not even fired at military targets, just at empty spaces as a test
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: Russian President

russia.text: I see no point in meeting his Ukrainian counterpart Volodymyr Zelensky until a peace deal is ready
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: Russian President

ukraine.text: Ukraine Is Ready to Share Drone Technology with Nordic and Baltic Countries
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: Ukrainian President

middle_east.text: They can just send a signal
middle_east.speaker: Farea al-Muslimi
middle_east.title: Chatham House Research Fellow

middle_east.text: Any continuation of Israeli aggression would bring far more devastating consequences
middle_east.speaker: Iranian Military Command
middle_east.title: Military Officials

middle_east.text: The strike on Iran was preparation for a more powerful blow
middle_east.speaker: Eyal Zamir
middle_east.title: IDF Chief of Staff

middle_east.text: I have just been informed by our Great Military that Iran shot down US helicopter, US military would respond
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Xi Jinping conducts rare state visit to North Korea, deepening cooperation with Kim Jong Un. Iran's Parliament Speaker describes China as a 'principal strategic partner' signaling closer ties. China reasserts influence over North Korea amid regional security realignments.

Apache helicopter crashes near Strait of Hormuz with crew reported safe by Trump. Defense manufacturing executive highlights drone warfare reshaping conflicts. Trump claims peace talks progressing despite Israel-Iran clashes.
EU unveiled 21st sanctions package targeting Russian economy and soldiers. Commission chief von der Leyen reported Russia's economy is slowing sharply from sanctions impact.
New Bulgarian government announced it will abandon previous policy of supplying arms to Ukraine. Defense Minister Dimitar Stoyanov confirmed the policy change.

financial.notes: Gold and silver hit 2-month lows following Iran tensions and interest rate hike fears, while oil futures showed volatility despite supply disruptions.

update_log.text: Israeli strike on vehicle in Sidon kills two people
Trump orders US military response after Iran shoots down Apache helicopter
Israel conducts new strikes on Hezbollah targets in Lebanese city of Tyre
Xi Jinping returns to China after concluding North Korea state visit
EU proposes entry ban for Russian military personnel in new sanctions package
US strikes Iranian water facilities in retaliation for helicopter downing
Israel orders evacuation of entire city of Tyre in Lebanon for first time
Iran announces halt to strikes against Israel but warns against further aggression
Xi Jinping concludes North Korea visit with pledge for deeper bilateral cooperation
Iran launches missile attacks on Israel amid escalating regional tensions
Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang for first North Korea visit since 2019
US Apache helicopter crashes near Strait of Hormuz, crew safe
Ukrainian drone strikes ignite fires at Russian oil facilities
